channel.title: Our Menu on Tony's Pizza
channel.description: Recent content in Our Menu on Tony's Pizza

item.title: BBQ Chicken
item.description: Smoky BBQ sauce, grilled chicken, red onion, and cilantro. A twist on the classic.

item.title: Diavola
item.description: Spicy salami, fresh mozzarella, and chili oil. For those who like it hot.

item.title: Hawaiian
item.description: Ham, pineapple, and mozzarella. Sweet, salty, and surprisingly divisive—but our version wins converts.

item.title: Margherita
item.description: The classic Neapolitan—tomato, fresh mozzarella, basil, and olive oil. Simple perfection.

item.title: Meat Lover
item.description: Pepperoni, sausage, ham, bacon, and meatballs. The ultimate carnivore pizza.

item.title: Pepperoni
item.description: America’s favorite—spicy pepperoni, tomato sauce, and mozzarella. A crowd-pleaser.

item.title: Quattro Formaggi
item.description: Four cheeses—mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, and fontina—on a white base. Rich and creamy.

item.title: Veggie Supreme
item.description: Bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, olives, tomatoes, and spinach. Loaded with fresh vegetables.
